title: Stackbot
description: Created a chatbot from Python StackOverflow questions and answers.

title: CodeBlue
description: Created a website to predict severity of future natural disasters, and link  people to local charities.

title: Basketball Court Keypoint Detection
description: Created a computer vision model to recognize keypoints on the basketball court. Also, used homography projection to reobtain low confidence points.

title: League of Legends Gold Difference Analysis
description: Used a random forest model to predict the outcome of games. Achieved a test accuracy of 85% and also assessed the importance of different features.

title: Facial Recognition
description: Uses Pytorch to create a CNN to recognize similar faces. Use contrastive loss for model training, and achieved an AUC of .971 and a mean separation of .63 between inter-class and intra-class distances
